form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. At debut, 6th of 9 at Dundalk All Weather on February 27 over 1609m, 10 len behind Blanc De Blanc carrying 59.5kg at $6. Last start 10th of 23 at Curragh on March 15 over 1609m, on rain affected going; 25 len behind Victory Tip with 59.5kg at $7. Well suited here and is sure to give this a mighty shake.

formComments.title: TAB
